label: Nullglow Sleeping Alcove
description: Nullglow Sleeping Alcove is a narrow, recessed chamber cut into the servitorium’s vitrified stone and slagcrete shell, its surfaces sealed against ash intrusion and electrostatic pressure shifts. A built-in bunk and riveted storage niche dominate the space, their fittings overengineered to resist the constant vibration carried through the hab tiers from beacon pylons and relays. Slit-lamps sit behind hooded baffles to maintain a low-glare interior, while a shielded vent grid meters air in a steady, grit-filtered draft. Sound is subdued by layered paneling and overplating, leaving only a muted mechanical hum and the faintest vox bleed from the recessed niche beyond.
